basic_details.job_title: ICMR NICHR Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute of Child Health Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute of Child Health Research (ICMR NICHR) Senior Consultant (Admin.) Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website icmr.gov.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR NICHR Senior Consultant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 40 years Maximum Age: 70 years Age Relaxation: As per ICMR guidelines

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Management / Law / Public Administration / Finance & Accounts / CA / ICWAI / Commerce / Economics, Bachelor degree for retired government employees
qualification.details: Professional having at least 12 years of experience in Administration / Finance & Accounts, Audit, Legal in Govt. Dept/PSU/Autonomous Bodies and Post Graduate degree in relevant subject viz., Management / Law / Public Administration / Finance & Accounts / CA / ICWAI / Commerce / Economics, etc. OR Retired Govt. employees with Bachelor degree in any discipline and in the Pay Level-7 and above with 10 years of experience in the field of Management / Law / Public Administration / Finance & Accounts / CA /ICWAI / Commerce / Economics, etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR NICHR Senior Consultant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.icmr.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR NICHR Senior Consultant (Admin.) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR NICHR Senior Consultant (Admin.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Consultant (Admin.) post?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate degree in Management, Law, Public Administration, Finance & Accounts, CA, ICWAI, Commerce, or Economics is required. Retired government employees with a Bachelor's degree and relevant experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 40 years and the maximum age limit is 70 years for the Senior Consultant (Admin.) position.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Consultant (Admin.) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Consultant (Admin.) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 1,00,000 to Rs. 1,50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Senior Consultant (Admin.).

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by ICMR National Institute of Child Health Research (ICMR NICHR).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ICMR, which is https://www.icmr.gov.in.
